description: 가우디의 예술과 지중해 해변, 축구와 타파스의 도시

scenes.npcDialog: Hola! La Sagrada Familia has been under construction since 1882! Book tickets online to skip the 2-hour queue. The towers have amazing views!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 올라! 사그라다 파밀리아는 1882년부터 공사 중이에요! 온라인 예매하면 2시간 줄을 안 서요. 타워 경치가 끝내줘요!

choices.text: Since 1882? When will it be finished?
I booked online! Which tower has better views?
Why isn't it finished yet?
Churches are all the same.

scenes.npcDialog: Park Güell is Gaudí's masterpiece! The mosaic lizard is the most photographed. Monumental Zone needs tickets, but the rest is free!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 구엘 공원은 가우디 걸작이에요! 모자이크 도마뱀이 가장 인기 있어요. 기념 구역은 티켓 필요하지만 나머지는 무료예요!

choices.text: I want to see the famous lizard! Is it crowded?
The mosaics are incredible! Is this all recycled materials?
Why do I need tickets for a park?
Mosaics are old-fashioned.

scenes.npcDialog: Welcome to La Boqueria! Try fresh fruit juice, jamón ibérico, or seafood! The market has been here since 1217. Sample everything!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 라 보케리아에 오신 걸 환영해요! 과일 주스, 하몽 이베리코, 해산물 맛보세요! 이 시장은 1217년부터 있었어요. 다 시식하세요!

choices.text: Since 1217! I'll try the jamón ibérico first.
The colors are amazing! What fresh juice do you recommend?
Markets are too crowded.
I don't eat street food.

scenes.npcDialog: Las Ramblas is Barcelona's heart! 1.2 km of street performers, flower stalls, and cafes. Watch your belongings though - pickpockets love tourists!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 람블라스는 바르셀로나의 심장이에요! 1.2km의 거리 예술가, 꽃가게, 카페. 소지품 조심하세요 - 소매치기가 관광객 좋아해요!

choices.text: Thanks for the warning! I'll keep my bag in front.
The street performers are amazing! Can I tip them?
Pickpockets are everywhere anyway.
Walking is tiring.

scenes.npcDialog: Hola! Ready for tapas? Patatas bravas, gambas al ajillo, croquetas, jamón... In Spain we share everything! What would you like to start?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 올라! 타파스 준비됐어요? 파타타스 브라바스, 감바스 알 아히요, 크로케타스, 하몽... 스페인에선 나눠 먹어요! 뭐부터 할까요?

choices.text: Patatas bravas and gambas al ajillo please!
What's your most popular tapa?
I don't like sharing food.
These portions are too small.

scenes.npcDialog: Welcome to Camp Nou! Home of FC Barcelona and 99,000 fans! The museum has all the trophies. Would you like the stadium tour?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 캄프 누에 오신 걸 환영해요! FC 바르셀로나와 99,000 팬의 홈이에요! 박물관에 모든 트로피가 있어요. 스타디움 투어 하실래요?

choices.text: Yes! I want to see where Messi played!
Can I take photos on the pitch?
I don't follow soccer.
99,000 is too many people.

scenes.npcDialog: Barceloneta Beach! The Mediterranean is perfect today. You can rent a sunbed and umbrella. The chiringuitos serve great paella and sangria!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 바르셀로네타 해변이에요! 오늘 지중해가 완벽해요. 선베드와 파라솔 빌릴 수 있어요. 치링기토에서 빠에야와 상그리아가 맛있어요!

choices.text: Paella on the beach sounds perfect!
I'll take a sunbed. How much for the day?
Beaches are too sandy.
I don't like the sun.

scenes.npcDialog: Our paella is cooked over wood fire! Seafood, mixed, or vegetarian? It takes 20 minutes to prepare fresh. Sangria while you wait?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 빠에야는 장작불에 요리해요! 해산물, 믹스, 채식? 신선하게 만들어서 20분 걸려요. 기다리며 상그리아 하실래요?

choices.text: Seafood paella please! And yes to sangria!
What makes your paella special?
20 minutes is too long to wait.
I prefer rice from a box.

scenes.npcDialog: Flamenco is passion! The show includes guitar, singing, and dancing. Tablao shows are intimate - only 50 seats. Dinner show or just the performance?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 플라멩코는 열정이에요! 공연에 기타, 노래, 춤이 있어요. 타블라오 공연은 친밀해요 - 50석뿐이에요. 디너쇼? 공연만?

choices.text: Dinner show sounds amazing! What time does it start?
50 seats means great views! I'll take it.
Dancing shows are boring.
I don't understand Spanish music.

scenes.npcDialog: Casa Batlló is Gaudí's House of Bones! The facade looks like the sea. Our augmented reality guide brings the rooms to life. Magic!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 카사 바트요는 가우디의 뼈의 집이에요! 파사드가 바다 같아요. 증강현실 가이드가 방을 살려내요. 마법이에요!

choices.text: Augmented reality sounds cool! How does it work?
The colors are incredible! Did Gaudí design everything?
The building looks weird.
AR is just a gimmick.

scenes.npcDialog: The Gothic Quarter has shops from medieval times! Unique boutiques, artisan workshops. Our handmade espadrilles are traditional Catalan!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 고딕 지구에는 중세 시대부터 가게가 있어요! 독특한 부티크, 장인 공방. 수제 에스파드리유가 전통 카탈루냐예요!

choices.text: Handmade espadrilles! Can I try them on?
These narrow streets are so charming!
Handmade means expensive.
I prefer big shopping malls.

scenes.npcDialog: Churros con chocolate! Our chocolate is thick - you dip the churros. This is how Barcelona does breakfast! Or a midnight snack!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 츄로스 콘 초콜라테! 초콜릿이 진해요 - 츄로스를 찍어 드세요. 바르셀로나식 아침이에요! 아니면 야식!

choices.text: The chocolate is so thick! This is amazing!
Churros for breakfast? I could get used to this!
This is too sweet for me.
I prefer donuts.

scenes.npcDialog: Montjuïc has the best views of Barcelona! Take the cable car up. The castle, gardens, and Olympic Stadium are all here. Magic Fountain show at night!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 몬주익은 바르셀로나 최고 전망이에요! 케이블카 타고 올라가세요. 성, 정원, 올림픽 스타디움이 다 여기 있어요. 밤엔 분수쇼!

choices.text: Cable car sounds fun! When is the fountain show?
The 1992 Olympics! I'd love to see the stadium.
Cable cars are scary.
I'm not interested in views.

scenes.npcDialog: Picasso spent his formative years in Barcelona! Our museum has 4,251 works. The Blue Period paintings are particularly moving.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 피카소가 바르셀로나에서 성장했어요! 박물관에 4,251점이 있어요. 청색 시대 그림이 특히 감동적이에요.

choices.text: 4,251 works! Where should I start?
I love the Blue Period! Which room are they in?
Picasso's art is too abstract.
Art museums are tiring.

scenes.npcDialog: Cava is Catalonia's sparkling wine! Similar to champagne but different grapes. We also have excellent Rioja and Priorat. Salud!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 카바는 카탈루냐 스파클링 와인이에요! 샴페인과 비슷하지만 다른 포도예요. 리오하와 프리오라트도 훌륭해요. 살루드!

choices.text: I'd love to try Cava! How is it different from champagne?
Salud! What food pairs well with Cava?
Champagne is better than Cava.
I don't like sparkling wine.

scenes.npcDialog: La Pedrera means 'the quarry' - look at the wavy stone! The rooftop has warrior chimneys. Night visits include a glass of cava!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 라 페드레라는 '채석장'이란 뜻이에요 - 물결치는 돌 보세요! 옥상에 전사 굴뚝이 있어요. 나이트 투어엔 카바가 포함!

choices.text: Night visit with cava sounds perfect!
Warrior chimneys? That sounds unique!
The building looks unfinished.
I've seen enough Gaudí.

scenes.npcDialog: The Metro is the easiest way around! T-Casual card gives you 10 trips. Works on metro, bus, and tram. Much cheaper than single tickets!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 메트로가 가장 편해요! T-캐주얼 카드로 10회 탈 수 있어요. 메트로, 버스, 트램에서 다 써요. 편도보다 훨씬 저렴해요!

choices.text: T-Casual sounds convenient! Where can I buy one?
Does it work for the airport train too?
Public transport is confusing.
I'll just take taxis.

scenes.npcDialog: Santa Caterina is where locals shop! Less touristy than Boqueria. Amazing fresh fish, Catalan cheeses, and the roof is a Gaudí-inspired mosaic!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 산타 카테리나는 현지인 시장이에요! 보케리아보다 관광객 적어요. 신선한 생선, 카탈루냐 치즈, 지붕이 가우디풍 모자이크예요!

choices.text: I love that it's more local! What cheese should I try?
Even the roof is art! Barcelona is amazing.
If there are fewer tourists, it must be worse.
Markets smell like fish.

scenes.npcDialog: Palau de la Música is UNESCO World Heritage! The stained glass ceiling is breathtaking. We have concerts most evenings - classical, jazz, flamenco!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 팔라우 드 라 무시카는 유네스코 세계유산이에요! 스테인드글라스 천장이 숨막혀요. 대부분 저녁에 콘서트해요 - 클래식, 재즈, 플라멩코!

choices.text: UNESCO World Heritage! Are there evening tickets available?
The ceiling is incredible! Can I take photos?
Classical music is boring.
I'm not into architecture.

scenes.npcDialog: El Born is where we party! This bar is famous for gin tonics. Barcelona loves gin - we have 50 varieties! What's your favorite?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 엘 보른은 파티 지구예요! 이 바는 진토닉으로 유명해요. 바르셀로나는 진을 사랑해요 - 50가지 있어요! 뭘 좋아하세요?

choices.text: 50 varieties! Recommend something local please.
I love a good gin tonic! What's popular here?
Gin is too strong for me.
I don't drink alcohol.
